-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://docs.jentic.com/guides/mcp/remote-mcp/)[Privacy Policy](https://jentic.com/privacy)[Support](https://discord.com/invite/TdbWXZsUSm)
    

Jentic connects Claude to 1,500+ APIs through a single MCP server. Credentials never touch your prompts — Jentic's managed vault handles auth centrally. Just-In-Time Tooling means agents fetch only the tools they need, keeping context lean and reasoning accurate.

You can use Jentic to:

**Find articles:**  
"Use Jentic to find articles on AI using NewsAPI"

**Get cryptocurrency prices:**  
"Use Jentic to find current price of bitcoin using coincap API"

**Access financial data:**  
"Use Jentic to find current price of NVIDIA using Finnhub API"

**Connect to any API:**  
"Search available APIs for weather data and execute a query"
